description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check style that runs on push events to all branches except master, staging.tmp, trying.tmp, and staging-squash-merge.tmp, and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository with submodules, installs required packages and tools, and then runs various style checks including clang-format, fix_style, header guards, languages, dilated images, shellcheck, log error case, pylint, and unused headers.
